## Change class

- [ ] **A — Protocol-touching** (Spine, Stitch signature, Ledger format, Brick boundaries)
- [ ] **B — Behavioral** (heuristics, routing, UI, internal helpers)
- [ ] **C — Editorial** (docs, formatting, comments)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run demo` runs end-to-end without errors
- [ ] No private / proprietary content added (see `.gitignore`, `.gitattributes`)
- [ ] Brain remains adapter-only — no new authority over Spine / Truth / Conscious / Stem / Ledger / Stitch
- [ ] Audit ledger format remains append-only and hash-chained
- [ ] Evidence labels in `docs/WHITEPAPER.md` were not weakened
